name: Garbanzo Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Zucchini squash or cucumber - grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients and vegetables together.
2. Gradually add water, stirring well to combine all ingredients.
3. Cook pancakes on an oiled skillet or griddle until golden brown.
VARIATIONS:
For lighter, extra tasty pancakes, substitute 1/2 cup AM Whole Wheat Flour for 1/2 cup of potato flakes. Add a tablespoon of oil, 2 teaspoons tamari soy sauce, and a little garlic to the water. Stir in the dry mixture, then cook as directed.
